# Homework 0 {.centered-title}
<!-- We expect Homework to be placed in the Appendix. To parse properly via auto-numbering.lua, assignments MUST be at heading level 1 (#), use the .centered-title class, and have a title of the form "Homework n" -->

::: {.content-hidden}
{{< include ../_macros.qmd >}}
:::

{{< include _homework-header.qmd >}}

::: {#exr-hypotenuse-calculation} 
Using @thm-pythagoras, find the hypotenuse of a right triangle with legs $a=3$ and $b=4$.
:::

:::: {.content-visible when-profile="instructor"}
::: {.block-1 .p-3 .rounded-4 .mb-4}
*Solution*.
Because we are using the `instructor` profile, you can see this! 
$$
    3^2 + 4^2 = c^2 \implies 9 + 16 = c^2 \implies c = 5.
$$
:::
::::
